name: CastCrew
description: Adds a Cast & Crew module to the Jellyfin sidebar for browsing actors, directors, producers, and other crew members.
overview: Browse actors, directors, and producers in a dedicated Cast & Crew page within Jellyfin Web.

versions.changelog: Add person-library filtering, improve Cast & Crew settings UX, and add optional debug mapping logs.
Add person-library filtering, improve Cast & Crew settings UX, and add optional debug mapping logs.
